column11: 1645: Got Underway. Got underweigh and stood in towards Fort Morgan

We last had a bearing which put her 30.17 -87.98. Then she went for stores, but no direction or distance given, so we left her in place. It must have been further south, so they could move closer to the fort, but I have no idea where that stores ship was.
